description: The RenderTextureProvider component is used as a target for rendering Camera or CameraPortal data onto. This component can be used as a texture for any material.

fields.Size: The size the camera renders in ``width`` and ``height``
fields.Depth: Precision, in bits, of the depth buffer used for rendering. Possibly values are 0, 16, 24 and 32.

usage: Attach to a slot and use as a render texture for any component that accepts it. The texture color data will now exist. Insert into any material to view.
